zh.Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France: 法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun於大約1042年出生在法國艾-吉洛易a奧度時，他的父親Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun22歲，母親Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne18歲。他於1079年與Agnes de Fréteval在法國崔洛易-吉黑結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1110年在法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France: 法国崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun于大约1042年出生在法国艾-吉洛易a奧度时，他的父亲Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun22岁，母亲Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne18岁。他于1079年与Agnes de Fréteval在法国崔洛易-吉黑结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1110年在法国崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun was born about 1042, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, his father, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, was 22 and his mother, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, was 18. He married Agnes de Fréteval in 1079, in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1110, in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun est né environ 1042, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Fréteval en 1079, à Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1110, à Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun um 1042 in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun 22 und seine Mutter Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne 18. Er hat 1079 in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Agnes de Fréteval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1110 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun è nato il circa 1042 nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, il suo padre, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Fréteval nel 1079, nel Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1110, nel Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudunが約1042年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで生まれた時，父Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudunは22歳，母Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagneは18歳であった。1079年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーでAgnes de Frétevalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1110年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアートウルズで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun(이)가 대략 1042년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1079년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처에서 Agnes de Fréteval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1110년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 토우르스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1042–about 1110: tany ho any amin'ny 1042–tany ho any amin'ny 1110

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Fréteval em 1079, em Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1110, em Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun родился около 1042 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Fréteval в 1079 г. в местности лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1110 г. в местности тоурс, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

sm.Abt 1042–about 1110: e tusa o le 1042–e tusa o le 1110

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun nació aproximadamente 1042, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Rotrou II du Perche vicomte de Châteaudun, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Comtesse Adeline de Domfront de Montagne, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes de Fréteval en 1079, en Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1110, en Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
